name: fde
description: Stage-based FDE skills for intake, discovery interviews, workflow mapping, pain analysis, AI opportunity assessment, MVP scoping, and solution briefs.

interface.shortDescription: 阶段型 FDE 客户发现与 MVP 收敛
interface.longDescription: FDE Skills provides a stage-based workflow for enterprise AI consulting: intake, discovery interviews, workflow mapping, pain analysis, AI opportunity assessment, MVP scoping, and customer-readable solution briefs.
defaultPrompt: 用 $fde-engagement-router 帮我判断当前应该进入哪个 FDE 阶段。
用 $fde-intake 帮我整理和 FDE 沟通前的业务材料。
用 $fde-discovery-interview 帮我准备客户访谈问题。
用 $fde-workflow-mapping 把这份访谈记录拆成业务流程。
用 $fde-mvp-scoping 帮我收敛一个 1-2 周可验证的 MVP。
